message:
feat(hook,transfer,health): forward CARGO_TARGET_DIR from delegated commands and expand path-dep resolution

Hook (rch/src/hook.rs):
- Extract CARGO_TARGET_DIR from delegated command tokens (--target-dir
  flag or CARGO_TARGET_DIR= prefix) when the env var is unset locally,
  enabling remote builds to honor the target directory specified in the
  original cargo invocation even when rch is called as a rustc wrapper
- Pass command_tokens through to resolve_forwarded_cargo_target_dir and
  the dependency runtime plan builder for context-aware resolution
- Remove workspace-root promotion from build_dependency_runtime_plan:
  individual package roots are now synced directly without promoting
  to enclosing workspace roots, which was causing over-syncing of
  unrelated workspace members

Cargo path deps (rch-common/src/cargo_path_deps.rs):
- Major expansion of path dependency resolution logic (+400 lines):
  handle nested workspace members, workspace inheritance, conditional
  path dependencies, and target-specific dependencies
- Add extract_cargo_target_dir_from_command_tokens() for parsing
  --target-dir/CARGO_TARGET_DIR from command argument vectors
- Improve error context and tracing throughout

Patterns (rch-common/src/patterns.rs):
- Remove 43 lines of dead pattern code superseded by the expanded
  cargo_path_deps resolver

Transfer (rch/src/transfer.rs):
- Expand transfer context with CARGO_TARGET_DIR forwarding metadata
- Additional safety checks for remote path construction

Health (rchd/src/health.rs):
- Expand daemon health reporting with slot utilization metrics and
  build queue depth

Workers (rchd/src/workers.rs):
- Add worker-side support for forwarded CARGO_TARGET_DIR in remote
  build environments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -44,6 +44,7 @@ uuid = { workspace = true }
 reqwest = { version = "0.13.2", features = ["json"] }
 sha2 = "0.10.9"
 shell-escape = "0.1.5"
+shell-words = "1.1.0"
 
 # State detection dependencies
 which = "8"
